layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content sections, each occupying 45% of slide width with a 10% center gap. The slide uses a clean, professional structure with generous padding (5% on all sides) to create breathing room. Both columns are visually equal peers, creating a balanced comparison layout. A full-width footer bar spans the bottom of the slide. The layout follows a left-to-right reading flow with clear visual hierarchy: slide title at top, two parallel content pillars in the middle, and a partnership statement at the bottom. Each column is treated as a unified card with rounded corners, light shadow glow for subtle lift, and internal structure using icon badges, section headers, and bullet lists. The design emphasizes clarity and professionalism appropriate for a government/regulatory audience.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.45, 0.45, 0.1]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): Equal-peer column occupying the left half of the content area (45% slide width). Structured as a rounded-rectangle card with white fill, thin brand primary border, visibly rounded corners, and even light grey shadow glow for card lift effect. Generous internal padding (4% on all sides). At the top: a circular icon badge (brand accent fill, white laptop icon centered) positioned left-aligned with a small top margin. Immediately below the badge: section header 'TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM' in brand primary color, bold, medium-to-large size, left-aligned. Below the header: subtitle text 'Cryptocurrency Analytics Capabilities' in brand dark color, regular weight, slightly smaller than header, left-aligned, with a thin dashed grey separator line below it spanning full column width. Main content area contains a bullet list with 6 items (Blockchain monitoring, Entity identification & attribution, Automated risk scoring, Analytics of VASP data, Investigation workbench, Dashboards & analytics). Bullet points use brand primary color circles as markers (small, proportional to body text height), with body text in brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset, regular weight, body font. Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining vertical space using flexGrow to prevent top-stacking. Thin dashed grey separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last one) to create visual rhythm. All text must fit comfortably within the column width without wrapping awkwardly.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): Equal-peer column occupying the right half of the content area (45% slide width), mirroring the structure of the left column exactly. Rounded-rectangle card with white fill, thin brand primary border, visibly rounded corners, and even light grey shadow glow. Generous internal padding (4% on all sides). Top and bottom edges must align exactly with LEFT COLUMN. At the top: circular icon badge (brand accent fill, white graduation cap icon centered) positioned left-aligned with a small top margin. Section header 'CAPACITY BUILDING' in brand primary color, bold, same size as left column header, left-aligned. Subtitle 'Training & Knowledge Transfer' in brand dark color, regular weight, left-aligned, with thin dashed grey separator line below spanning full column width. Main content area contains a bullet list with 6 items (Foundation training for all staff, Practitioner certification, Specialist programs, Leadership briefings, Hands-on labs, Case study workshops). Bullet markers are brand primary color circles (same size as left column), body text in brand text color, left-aligned with small left inset, regular weight, body font. Bullet items distributed evenly using flexGrow to match the vertical rhythm of the left column. Thin dashed grey separator lines between each bullet item (not after the last one), positioned at exactly the same vertical positions as the separators in the left column to enforce horizontal alignment across both columns. Font size must match left column exactly (within-slide uniformity rule C6).
  C2 (FULL-WIDTH FOOTER BAR): Full-width rounded rectangle spanning the entire slide width at the bottom, positioned with a small top margin above the slide's bottom edge. Fill: brand accent color. No border. Height: compact — just tall enough to contain the text with small top/bottom inset (approximately 8-10% of slide height). Corners: visibly rounded on all four corners for a soft, approachable feel. Text content: 'Log-term partnerships including support training and ability to adapt and provide solutions to emerging needs' in white color, bold weight, body font, centered both horizontally and vertically. Text size: medium, ensuring the text fits comfortably on one line without wrapping. This element provides visual closure to the slide and reinforces the partnership message.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): INACTIVE. The slide is well-filled by the two content columns and footer bar. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The card lift effect on the two columns provides sufficient visual structure and grouping.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): INACTIVE. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed for this layout. The two columns are independent parallel content sections with no visual links between them.

_reference_violations.description: C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform): text block occupies approximately 30-35% of container inner height. The bullet list ends roughly one-third down the container, leaving a massive empty white band (approximately 65-70% of container height) below the last bullet item. This is severely under-filled.

C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building): text block occupies approximately 30-35% of container inner height. The bullet list ends roughly one-third down the container, leaving a massive empty white band (approximately 65-70% of container height) below the last bullet item. This is severely under-filled.

_reference_critique:
C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Technology Platform) and C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Capacity Building) are both severely under-filled. The text content (icon badge, headers, subtitle, and 6 bullet items) occupies only approximately 30-35% of each container's inner height, leaving approximately 65-70% of each container as empty white space below the last bullet item. This violates the container fill ratio rule at the CRITICAL severity level (text occupies < 40% of container height).

SVGSketcher must increase the body font size for the bullet list items in both columns. Current body font size appears to be approximately 14-16pt. Increase body font size to approximately 20-22pt to fill at least 65% of the container inner height. Also increase the vertical spacing (line-height and margin-bottom) between bullet items proportionally to distribute the content more evenly across the available vertical space. The layout description specifies "Bullet items distributed evenly across remaining vertical space using flexGrow to prevent top-stacking" — this instruction was not followed. Apply flexGrow or equivalent spacing logic to spread the 6 bullet items vertically across the full container height, not just stack them at the top.

Additionally, consider increasing the subtitle font size and the spacing between the subtitle separator line and the first bullet item to further fill the vertical space. Ensure that the same font size adjustments are applied to both C0 and C1 to preserve within-slide uniformity (rule C6).
